  • Vow fulfillment: "बच्चे की health ठीक हो जाए तो बाल चढ़ाऊँगा" — wish granted → tonsure
  • Devotion/Surrender: Hair considered vanity — offering = ego surrender to God
  • Tradition: Family practice — "हर Tirumala visit पर tonsure" generational custom
  • First visit: कई families first Tirumala visit पर tonsure tradition follow करते हैं
  • Children: Baby's first tonsure (mundan) भगवान के सामने — auspicious माना जाता है
⚠️ **जरूरी बात:** Tonsure compulsory नहीं है — यह purely personal/family decision है। बिना tonsure भी darshan हो सकता है, sevas participate कर सकते हो, everything normal। कोई judge नहीं करता — "tonsure नहीं किया?" ऐसा pressure exist नहीं करता। [caption id="attachment_1409" align="alignnone" width="1024"] Kalyana Katta — 600+ chairs, professional barbers, completely FREE। तिरुमला में tonsure compulsory नहीं, यह devotion और मनौती (mokkuvalu) का symbol है — men, women, बच्चे सब करवा सकते हैं।[/caption]

Kalyana Katta — कहाँ होता है Tonsure?

Tirumala पर tonsure के लिए dedicated facility है — "Kalyana Katta"। यह world का largest tonsure center है।

Facility Details:

  • Name: Kalyana Katta (कल्याण कट्टा)
  • Location: Tirumala hilltop — temple से walking distance, well-signposted
  • Scale: 600+ barber chairs — simultaneously hundreds of tonsures
  • Managed by: TTD — professional barbers employed by trust
  • Cost: Completely FREE — no payment required (tips also not expected)
  • Capacity: 10,000-15,000 tonsures per day (peak days)

कैसे पहुँचें:

  • Tirumala bus stand से walking distance (~10-15 min walk)
  • Signboards "Kalyana Katta" → follow
  • TTD staff/volunteers direction दे देते हैं — पूछो "tonsure kahan hota hai?"
  • Near temple complex — darshan route से accessible
💡 **Insider Tip:** Kalyana Katta facility India की probably सबसे well-organized tonsure system है — 600+ chairs, numbered tokens, clean environment, trained barbers। "Roadside barber" type नहीं — professional setup है। First-timers surprized होते हैं how systematic it is।

Complete Process — Step by Step

Step 1: Decide और Mental Preparation

  • Tonsure personal decision है — family discuss करो, no pressure
  • Women: Full head shave या partial (front portion) — both options available
  • Men: Typically full head shave
  • Children: Full head — babies को hold करना पड़ता है

Step 2: Kalyana Katta पहुँचो

  • Token system — entry point पर token/number मिलता है
  • Queue join करो — token number call होने तक wait
  • Wait area: Covered, fans, seating available
  • Wait time: Off-peak 30-60 min | Peak (weekends/festivals) 2-4 hours

Step 3: Tonsure Process

  • Token call → designated chair पर बैठो
  • Barber professional है — quick, efficient, safe
  • Tools: Fresh blade every person — hygiene maintained
  • Water spray → shaving cream/soap → razor shave → clean
  • Duration: 5-10 minutes per person (very quick)
  • Children: Parent hold करता है — barbers experienced with kids

Step 4: Post-Tonsure

  • Wash area available — head wash करो (cold water)
  • Hair swept by workers — collected for processing (TTD auctions hair for revenue)
  • Apply coconut oil/cream (carry your own — soothing for fresh shave)
  • Sun protection: Cap/scarf carry — fresh shaved head sunburn easily
⚠️ **जरूरी बात:** Blade per person fresh use होता है — hygiene standard maintained। लेकिन अगर anxiety है, तो observe कर लो पहले (queue में time मिलेगा)। TTD barbers trained professionals हैं — cuts/nicks rare but possible (minor)।

Timing — कब जाएं Tonsure के लिए?

Kalyana Katta Operating Hours:

  • Opening: Early morning ~3 AM
  • Closing: Evening ~7 PM (varies seasonally)
  • Break: Brief maintenance breaks possible — but mostly continuous

Best Time to Go:

  • 🌅 Early morning 3-5 AM: BEST — minimum wait (30-45 min), fresh start
  • Morning 6-9 AM: Moderate crowd — 1-2 hours wait
  • Afternoon 12-3 PM: Less crowd (people in darshan queue) — 30-60 min
  • Evening 4-6 PM: Rush increases again — 1-2 hours
  • Weekends/Festivals: 3-4+ hours any time — avoid if possible
💡 **Insider Tip:** Darshan BEFORE tonsure करो या AFTER — यह personal preference है। मेरी recommendation: Tonsure पहले करो (early morning), फिर bath, फिर darshan। Reason: Fresh tonsure = spiritually "clean" feel, darshan ज्यादा meaningful लगता है। लेकिन कोई rule नहीं है — reverse भी ठीक।

Tonsure Before Darshan या After? — Common Debate

Approach Advantage Disadvantage
Tonsure BEFORE darshan Spiritually clean feel, traditional practice, "offering first" mindset Fresh shaved head in darshan queue = sun exposure if day time
Tonsure AFTER darshan Darshan done, relaxed tonsure, no rush Less "traditional" sequence — but perfectly acceptable
Same day different times Flexible planning Both queues same day = exhausting
**My recommendation:** अगर Tirumala पर 2 days stay है — Day 1 evening/night: Tonsure + bath + rest। Day 2 morning: Fresh darshan। Best of both worlds।

Women और Tonsure — Special Information

  • Allowed: हाँ — women tonsure completely allowed और common
  • Separate section: Kalyana Katta में women-only section available — privacy maintained
  • Female barbers: Women barbers available for female pilgrims
  • Options: Full head shave OR front portion only (कुछ women front hair offer करती हैं)
  • Post-tonsure: Dupatta/scarf carry — head covering socially comfortable
  • Cultural note: North India में women tonsure less common — लेकिन South India tradition में completely normal
⚠️ **जरूरी बात:** Women tonsure personal decision है — family या social pressure में मत करो, और equally किसी को judge भी मत करो जो करती हैं। यह devotion expression है — modern/traditional debate irrelevant यहाँ।

Children/Baby Tonsure — Parents Guide

  • Age: Any age — newborn से start (common first tonsure at 6 months-2 years)
  • Process: Parent (usually father) holds baby on lap → barber carefully shaves
  • Crying: Expected — babies WILL cry। Normal hai, barbers experienced, quick finish
  • Safety: Barbers trained for baby tonsure — extra careful, specialized small blades
  • Tip: Baby को feed करके ले जाओ (less cranky), favourite toy carry (distraction)
  • Post-tonsure: Apply coconut oil immediately, cover head (sun + cold both sensitive)
💡 **Insider Tip:** Baby first tonsure Tirumala पर करवाना South Indian families में बहुत auspicious माना जाता है। North India से भी families आती हैं specifically इसके लिए। Best approach: Early morning (baby freshest), feed 30 min before, and accept that crying will happen — it's over in 3-4 minutes।

What to Carry — Practical Checklist

  • ✅ Towel: Head wipe + bath after — Kalyana Katta towel provide नहीं करता
  • ✅ Coconut oil: Small bottle — apply immediately after shave (soothes skin)
  • ✅ Cap/scarf: Sun protection — fresh shaved head burns quickly
  • ✅ Change of clothes: Hair particles shirt पर — fresh clothes darshan के लिए
  • ✅ Plastic bag: Used towel/hairy clothes store
  • ✅ Baby: Diaper + feeding supplies + favourite toy
  • ✅ Moisturizer/lotion: Shaved skin dryness — apply after wash

After Tonsure — What to Expect

  • Appearance: Obviously completely different — accept it, own it, it's temporary
  • Sensitivity: Head extra sensitive 2-3 days — sun, cold, touch all feel different
  • Growth: Hair grows back 1-2 months significant, 3-4 months normal look
  • Sunburn risk: HIGH — cap/scarf mandatory outdoors for 1-2 weeks
  • Night cold: Tirumala cool nights — head cover while sleeping (cap/monkey cap)
  • Office/work: Plan accordingly — 2-3 weeks visible। Most people understand "Tirumala tonsure"
  • Photos: Take a photo — years later you'll cherish this memory!

Hair Collection — Where Does It Go?

  • Collection: All hair collected by TTD systematically from Kalyana Katta floor
  • Processing: Cleaned, sorted, graded by quality and length
  • Auction: TTD conducts international auctions — hair sold to wig/extension manufacturers
  • Revenue: ₹200-300 crore annually from hair auctions — significant TTD revenue source
  • Use: Mainly wigs, hair extensions (global demand — Italy, China major buyers)
  • No religious misuse: Hair not used for any other religious/ritual purpose post-collection

आम गलतियाँ — Common Mistakes

  • ❌ "Tonsure ज़रूरी है darshan ke liye" समझना — Most common myth। Tonsure और darshan independent हैं — बिना tonsure darshan hota hai, sevas participate kar sakte ho। Tonsure = personal vow, not entry requirement।
  • ❌ Weekend/festival day tonsure plan करना without time buffer — Peak days 3-4+ hours wait। Darshan timing + tonsure timing दोनों clash हो सकती हैं। Weekday या early morning (3-5 AM) जाओ — minimal wait।
  • ❌ Tonsure ke baad directly sun में निकलना — Fresh shaved head = zero sun protection। 30 min direct sun = painful sunburn। Cap/scarf mandatory carry करो — bahar निकलते ही पहनो।
  • ❌ Coconut oil/moisturizer carry नहीं करना — Razor shave skin irritation deta hai — oil soothes। Kalyana Katta provide नहीं करता। Small bottle carry करो — immediately after apply।
  • ❌ Baby ko hungry/tired state में ले जाना — Hungry + tired baby = extreme crying + parent frustration + barber difficulty। Feed 30 min before, well-rested time choose करो — process smooth होगा।
  • ❌ Post-tonsure head wash गर्म पानी से करना immediately — Hot water on fresh razor-shaved skin = burning sensation। Room temperature या slightly cool water use करो first wash। Hot water next day onwards okay।
  • ❌ Extra clothes/towel carry नहीं करना — Hair particles shirt, pants everywhere। Darshan fresh clothes में जाना चाहोगे — change carry करो। Dirty hairy clothes plastic bag में रखो।

इन्हें भी पढ़ें

  • TTD Arjitha Sevas की complete list — timings, cost और booking
  • तिरुमला दर्शन के प्रकार 2026 — पूरी जानकारी
  • तिरुपति यात्रा packing list — ये चीज़ें भूलना मत
  • पहली बार तिरुमला जाने वालों के लिए complete experience guide

अक्सर पूछे जाने वाले प्रश्न — FAQ

[sc_fs_multi_faq headline-0="h4" question-0="प्र. तिरुमला में मुंडन (tonsure) ज़रूरी है क्या?" answer-0="बिल्कुल नहीं — tonsure compulsory नहीं है। यह personal religious vow (mokkuvalu) है जो devotees अपनी इच्छा से करते हैं। बिना tonsure darshan, sevas, सब normally हो सकता है। कोई pressure या requirement नहीं।" headline-1="h4" question-1="प्र. Tirumala में tonsure कहाँ होता है?" answer-1="Kalyana Katta — Tirumala hilltop पर dedicated tonsure facility। 600+ chairs, TTD managed, professional barbers। Temple से walking distance, well-signposted। Token system — entry पर number मिलता है, call होने पर turn।" headline-2="h4" question-2="प्र. Tirumala tonsure free है?" answer-2="हाँ — completely free। TTD कोई charge नहीं लेता। Tips भी expected नहीं। Professional barbers TTD employees हैं — salary से काम करते हैं। World's largest free tonsure service।" headline-3="h4" question-3="प्र. Tonsure में कितना time लगता है?" answer-3="Actual shaving: 5-10 minutes per person (very quick)। Wait time: Off-peak 30-60 min, peak (weekends/festivals) 2-4 hours। Best time: Early morning 3-5 AM — minimum wait। Total plan 1-2 hours करो comfortable।" headline-4="h4" question-4="प्र. Women tonsure कर सकती हैं Tirumala में?" answer-4="हाँ — women tonsure allowed और common है। Kalyana Katta में separate women section, female barbers available, privacy maintained। Full head या front portion — both options। Personal choice — कोई compulsion नहीं।" headline-5="h4" question-5="प्र. Baby/child का first tonsure Tirumala में करवा सकते हैं?" answer-5="हाँ — any age allowed। Babies (6 months+) commonly Tirumala पर first tonsure करवाते हैं — auspicious माना जाता है। Parent holds baby, trained barber carefully shaves। Crying normal — 3-4 minutes में complete। Feed baby before going।" headline-6="h4" question-6="प्र. Tonsure darshan से पहले करें या बाद में?" answer-6="कोई strict rule नहीं — personal preference। Traditional approach: Tonsure first → bath → darshan (offering before seeking)। Practical approach: Darshan first → relaxed tonsure after। Both acceptable। 2-day stay हो तो Day 1 tonsure, Day 2 darshan — best balance।" count="7" html="true"] ⚠️ **Kalyana Katta timings seasonally vary हो सकते हैं। Latest information tirumala.org पर verify करें।** *Last Updated: June 2026*

wp:postmeta.wp:meta_value: तिरुमला में मुंडन (Mokkuvalu) कैसे होता है? Kalyana Katta process, timing, rules, free tonsure और बच्चों का मुंडन — complete guide Hindi में 2026।

item.title: तिरुपति के best vegetarian restaurants — pilgrims के लिए guide
item.dc:creator: venkat
item.content:encoded:
30 घंटे train में Maggi और biscuits खाकर Tirupati पहुँचे — और पहली proper meal South Indian thali थी जिसमें कुछ समझ नहीं आ रहा था यह story हर North Indian pilgrim की है — Bihar, UP, Rajasthan, Delhi से 30+ घंटे travel करके Tirupati पहुँचो, भूख extreme हो, और restaurant में menu में लिखा हो: Pesarattu, Upma, Pongal, Rasam Rice, Curd Rice। मन करे roti-sabzi का, लेकिन दिखे idli-dosa का। First time disorienting लगता है। लेकिन honest बात कहूँ — Tirupati का vegetarian food excellent है। South Indian cuisine naturally vegetarian-dominant है, ingredients fresh हैं, और quantity generous। बस adaptation period चाहिए — 2-3 meals में taste buds adjust हो जाते हैं, और फिर sambar rice, curd rice, ghee dosa — यह सब comfort food बन जाता है। मैं 6 बार Tirupati गया हूँ — हर बार food explore किया। पहली बार struggle किया, बाकी 5 बार enjoy किया। यह article — best vegetarian restaurants, North Indian food कहाँ मिलता है, budget options, और "क्या order करें अगर South Indian food new है" — सब cover करता है।
⚡ संक्षिप्त उत्तर — Tirupati Vegetarian Restaurants:
  • Pure veg city: Tirupati predominantly vegetarian — options abundant
  • Budget meal: ₹50-100 (thali/meals — unlimited rice + curries)
  • Mid-range: ₹150-300 (restaurant dining, variety)
  • North Indian food: Available in select restaurants — not everywhere
  • Best areas: Railway station area, Karakambadi Road, Bus stand area
  • Free option: TTD Annadanam — unlimited free meals (Tirumala)

Tirupati Food Scene — Basic Understanding

Tirupati temple town है — food culture पूरी तरह vegetarian dominated है।
  • Vegetarian majority: 90%+ restaurants pure vegetarian — finding non-veg very difficult (and not recommended temple town में)
  • South Indian dominant: Rice-based meals primary — idli, dosa, vada, sambar rice, rasam rice, curd rice
  • North Indian available: Select restaurants — roti, dal, paneer — but not everywhere
  • Pricing: Very affordable — temple town economics, pilgrim-friendly rates
  • Timings: Early morning 5-6 AM onwards (pilgrim schedule) — late night limited (after 10 PM)
  • Hygiene: Generally good — temple town standards, competition keeps quality up
💡 **Insider Tip:** Tirupati में "meals" order करो restaurant में — यह unlimited rice + sambar + rasam + curd + vegetables + papad + pickle plate है। ₹80-120 में full stomach guaranteed। North India का "thali" concept — but South Indian style। Value for money unbeatable।

Top Vegetarian Restaurants — Area-Wise

Railway Station Area (Convenience — Late Night Arrivals)

  • Laxmi Narayana Bhavan: Pure South Indian, ₹50-150, 6 AM-10 PM, station 200m
  • Hotel Annapurna Restaurant: South + North Indian, ₹100-250, hotel guests + walk-in, good thali
  • Sri Venkateshwara Bhavan: Budget meals, ₹60-100, quick service, always crowded (good sign)
  • Station Canteen (IRCTC): Basic South Indian, ₹40-80, platform 1, 24/7 — emergency option

Karakambadi Road (Quality — Family Dining)

  • Minerva Grand Restaurant: Multi-cuisine veg, ₹150-350, AC dining, North + South + Chinese, family-friendly
  • Maya Restaurant (Marasa Sarovar): Hotel restaurant, ₹200-400, variety, comfortable ambiance
  • Sri Krishna Bhavan: Authentic South Indian, ₹80-150, popular with locals (quality indicator)
  • Pai Viceroy Restaurant: Multi-cuisine, ₹150-300, reliable consistency

Bus Stand Area (Tirumala Bus Proximity)

  • Raghavendra Mess: Authentic Andhra meals, ₹70-100, unlimited, spicy (real local experience)
  • Sri Balaji Bhavan: Budget tiffin + meals, ₹50-120, fast service, morning tiffin excellent
  • Shanmukha Restaurant: South Indian + limited North, ₹80-180, decent variety

Tirumala Hilltop (Limited Options — TTD Dominated)

  • TTD Annadanam: Completely FREE — unlimited meals, breakfast/lunch/dinner, simple but nutritious
  • TTD Canteens: ₹30-60, basic meals, multiple locations on hilltop
  • Private options: Very limited on Tirumala — TTD controls food services mostly
⚠️ **जरूरी बात:** Restaurant names और ownership change होते हैं Tirupati में — Google Maps पर "vegetarian restaurants near me" search करो current results के लिए। Listed names representative हैं — ratings और recent reviews ज़रूर check करो before visiting।

North Indian Food कहाँ मिलता है? — Hindi Belt Pilgrims के लिए

North India से आने वालों का सबसे बड़ा concern: "Roti-sabzi मिलेगी कहीं?"

North Indian Food Available At:

  • Hotel Annapurna Restaurant: Roti, dal, paneer butter masala, aloo gobi — decent North Indian
  • Minerva Grand: Extensive North Indian section — naan, dal makhani, shahi paneer
  • Pai Viceroy: North Indian thali available — chapati + sabzi + dal + rice
  • Maya Restaurant: Good North Indian options — paneer dishes, rajma, chole
  • Select 3-star hotel restaurants: Most 3-star hotels North Indian menu carry करते हैं

Reality Check — North Indian Food Quality:

  • Available है — but Delhi/Lucknow quality expect मत करो
  • Roti often slightly different texture — South Indian wheat different
  • Spice level adjusted for South palate — less mirch, more tamarind influence
  • "Paneer butter masala" मिलेगा — but taste slightly Andhra-fied
  • Best approach: Mix and match — 1 meal North Indian, 1 meal try South Indian
💡 **Insider Tip:** मेरी honest recommendation — Tirupati में South Indian food try करो। Ghee dosa, masala dosa, filter coffee, sambar vada — यह world-class food है और fresh बनता है। "Apna khana" attachment 2-3 days छोड़ो — new experience enjoy करो। लौटकर roti-sabzi तो मिल ही जाएगी!

Budget Food — ₹100 से कम में Full Meal

Tirupati pilgrims generally budget-conscious होते हैं — good news: यहाँ excellent food बहुत सस्ता मिलता है।

Budget Options:

  • "Meals" (unlimited thali): ₹70-120 — rice + sambar + rasam + curd + 2 vegetables + papad + pickle। All unlimited refills।
  • Morning tiffin: ₹30-60 — idli (4 pcs) + sambar/chutney, या dosa + chutney
  • Vada + filter coffee: ₹40-50 — perfect snack combo
  • Pongal + sambar: ₹50-70 — South Indian breakfast favourite
  • Curd rice + pickle: ₹40-50 — simple, cooling, stomach-friendly (best for upset stomach)
  • TTD Annadanam (Tirumala): ₹0 (FREE) — unlimited meals, all day

Budget Strategy:

  • Breakfast: Local bhavan (₹40-60) — idli/dosa/pongal + coffee
  • Lunch: "Meals" at any restaurant (₹80-120) — full unlimited thali
  • Dinner: Light — dosa or tiffin (₹50-70) or hotel room service (₹100-150)
  • Total day: ₹170-350 per person food — extremely affordable

South Indian Food — "क्या Order करें" Quick Guide (First-Timers)

Item क्या है Taste Profile Try करें?
Idli Steamed rice cake — soft, white Mild, neutral — sambar/chutney se taste ✅ Safe start
Masala Dosa Crispy rice crepe + potato filling Crispy, spicy potato inside ✅ Everyone loves
Vada Deep fried lentil donut Crunchy outside, soft inside ✅ Snack favourite
Sambar Rice Rice + lentil-vegetable gravy mixed Tangy, spicy, comfort food ✅ Try with ghee
Rasam Rice Rice + thin spiced tamarind soup Sour, peppery — like soup + rice ✅ Digestive
Curd Rice Rice + yogurt + tempering Cool, mild, creamy ✅ Stomach settle
Pongal Rice-lentil porridge with ghee+pepper Mild, comforting, breakfast staple ✅ Safe choice
Pesarattu Green gram dosa — Andhra specialty Slightly different, nutritious ⭐ Adventurous try
Filter Coffee South Indian decoction coffee + milk Strong, frothy, sweet ✅ MUST try
💡 **Insider Tip:** अगर South Indian food completely new है — Day 1 safe choices: Masala Dosa + Filter Coffee (breakfast), Meals/Thali (lunch), Idli + Sambar (dinner)। Day 2 onwards experiment — Pongal, Rasam Rice, Vada। Curd Rice अगर stomach upset — instant relief देता है।

Eating Etiquette — Temple Town में

  • Hand eating: South Indian meals traditionally right hand से — spoon/fork available पूछने पर, but try eating with hand (authentic experience)
  • Unlimited refills: "Meals" में waiter आएगा refill देने — hand gesture या "haan" बोलो for more, "bas" for stop
  • Banana leaf: कुछ traditional restaurants banana leaf पर serve करते हैं — eco-friendly, adds flavour
  • Water: Packaged water prefer करो — or ask for "filtered water" (RO)
  • Tipping: Not expected in budget restaurants — mid-range: ₹20-50 sufficient
  • Timing respect: Lunch rush 12-2 PM extreme — 11:30 AM या 2:30 PM जाओ less crowd

Food Timing — Pilgrim Schedule Friendly

  • Early morning (4-6 AM): Some bhavans open early — tiffin available for early Tirumala bus catchers
  • Breakfast (6-10 AM): Peak tiffin time — idli, dosa, pongal, vada everywhere
  • Lunch (11 AM-3 PM): "Meals" time — unlimited thali, most popular meal
  • Snack (3-5 PM): Dosa, vada, coffee — light options
  • Dinner (7-10 PM): Tiffin or meals — most restaurants close 10-10:30 PM
  • Late night (post 10 PM): Very limited — hotel room service, station canteen only reliable
⚠️ **जरूरी बात:** Tirumala bus पकड़ने के लिए 4-5 AM निकलना है तो previous night dinner time ही next morning snack pack कर लो — इतनी early में open restaurants ढूँढना difficult। Bananas, dry snacks, biscuits keep करो room में emergency food।

Food Safety Tips — Pilgrims के लिए

  • Water: Always packaged/filtered — tap water avoid
  • Street food: Busy stalls choose (high turnover = fresh) — empty stalls avoid
  • Spice level: Andhra cuisine SPICY है — "less spicy" specifically बोलो order करते time
  • Stomach issue: Curd rice + banana — safest recovery food। Pharmacies everywhere — Electral ORS packets carry करो
  • First day: Light food recommended — travel fatigue + new cuisine = digestion stress। Heavy meals avoid Day 1
  • Darshan day: Light breakfast, avoid heavy/spicy — 6-12 hours queue में heavy food = acidity/gas

आम गलतियाँ — Common Mistakes

  • ❌ "South Indian food मुझे पसंद नहीं" बोलकर sirf North Indian ढूँढते रहना — Limited North Indian options ढूँढने में time waste + average quality मिलेगा। Open mind रखो — fresh dosa, sambar vada, filter coffee = life-changing food experience। Try करो पहले।
  • ❌ Tirumala पर food arrangements plan नहीं करना — Tirumala hilltop पर private restaurants almost नहीं हैं। TTD Annadanam (free) और TTD canteens ही main options — accept this reality, Annadanam time plan करो।
  • ❌ Full spicy Andhra meal Day 1 पर खाना — Andhra food North Indian palate से significantly spicier है। First day "less spicy" specifically demand करो — otherwise stomach upset guaranteed। Gradually increase।
  • ❌ Darshan day morning heavy breakfast करना — Heavy meal + 6-12 hours standing queue = acidity, gas, restroom urgency (queue से निकलना = spot lose)। Light breakfast — idli, banana, biscuit sufficient।
  • ❌ Packaged water carry नहीं करना — Temple town water generally safe but body new environment = sensitivity possible। Packaged water first 2-3 days mandatory। ₹20 bottle = health insurance।
  • ❌ Late night food plan बिना hotel room service check किए — 10 PM बाद Tirupati shut हो जाता है mostly। Hotel room service confirm करो check-in पर। Alternative: Bananas, dry snacks room में रखो।
  • ❌ Restaurant तो ढूँढा लेकिन "meals" order करना भूल गए — "Meals" (unlimited thali) सबसे value-for-money option है South Indian restaurant में। Menu की individual items order करोगे तो 2x ज्यादा खर्च + less food। "Meals लगाओ" — one word solution।

इन्हें भी पढ़ें

  • Annadanam तिरुमला — free meals कैसे मिलती हैं pilgrims को
  • तिरुमला लड्डू प्रसाद — इतिहास, प्रकार और कैसे मिलता है
  • तिरुमला के अंदर food rules — क्या allowed है, क्या नहीं
  • तिरुपति यात्रा packing list — ये चीज़ें भूलना मत

अक्सर पूछे जाने वाले प्रश्न — FAQ

[sc_fs_multi_faq headline-0="h4" question-0="प्र. तिरुपति में North Indian food (roti-sabzi) मिलता है?" answer-0="हाँ — select restaurants में North Indian food available है (Hotel Annapurna, Minerva Grand, Pai Viceroy, 3-star hotel restaurants)। Quality decent but Delhi/UP level expect मत करो। Pure South Indian restaurants में नहीं मिलेगा — specifically 'North Indian menu' वाला restaurant ढूँढो।" headline-1="h4" question-1="प्र. तिरुपति में cheapest vegetarian meal कितने में मिलता है?" answer-1="₹50-70 में full tiffin (idli set, dosa, pongal)। ₹80-120 में unlimited 'meals' (thali — rice + sambar + rasam + curd + vegetables, all refillable)। Tirumala पर TTD Annadanam completely FREE है — unlimited meals breakfast/lunch/dinner।" headline-2="h4" question-2="प्र. Tirumala hilltop पर restaurant हैं?" answer-2="Private restaurants almost नहीं — TTD controlled area। Food options: TTD Annadanam (free, unlimited), TTD canteens (₹30-60, basic meals), small TTD authorized stalls। Hotel restaurants within TTD accommodation limited। Food carry करने की ज़रूरत नहीं — TTD food sufficient।" headline-3="h4" question-3="प्र. South Indian food adjust नहीं हो रहा — क्या करें?" answer-3="Safe options: Curd rice (yogurt rice — bland, comforting), Idli (neutral taste — sambar/chutney side), Pongal (mild, ghee-based). These don't challenge North Indian palate much। Filter Coffee try करो — universal hit। 2-3 meals बाद adjust हो जाता है — patience रखो।" headline-4="h4" question-4="प्र. Darshan day food strategy क्या रखें?" answer-4="Light breakfast (idli/banana) before queue join — heavy food avoid। Queue में dry snacks carry (biscuit, glucose, dry fruits, water bottle)। Darshan complete होने के बाद proper meal — Tirumala Annadanam या Tirupati restaurant। Empty stomach queue join मत करो — weakness आएगी।" headline-5="h4" question-5="प्र. तिरुपति में non-veg food मिलता है?" answer-5="Very limited और not recommended temple town में। Tirupati predominantly vegetarian city — especially temple area। कुछ outskirts restaurants non-veg serve करते हैं but pilgrim etiquette: Tirumala visit से 1 day before non-veg avoid करो। Temple area strictly vegetarian।" headline-6="h4" question-6="प्र. Late night (10 PM+) food options क्या हैं Tirupati में?" answer-6="Very limited — most restaurants close 10-10:30 PM। Options: Hotel room service (if available), Railway station canteen (IRCTC, 24/7, basic), packed snacks from room। Best strategy: Dinner 8-9 PM करो, late night ke liye bananas/biscuits room में ready रखो।" count="7" html="true"] ⚠️ **Restaurant names, ownership और prices change होते रहते हैं। Google Maps पर current reviews और ratings verify करो। tirumala.org पर TTD food services की latest info available है।** *Last Updated: June 2026*

wp:postmeta.wp:meta_value: तिरुपति में best vegetarian restaurants — South Indian, North Indian, budget thali और family dining। Pilgrims के लिए location, rates और honest reviews 2026।

item.title: तिरुमला के अंदर food rules — क्या allowed है, क्या नहीं
item.dc:creator: venkat
item.content:encoded:
तिरुमला पर एक family का Biryani packet gate पर confiscate हो गया — क्योंकि उन्हें पता ही नहीं था कि non-veg carry करना prohibited है यह real incident है जो मैंने personally देखा है Tirumala bus stand area पर। एक North Indian family train से Tirupati आई, station पर Biryani pack करवाया, Tirumala bus में बैठी, और hilltop पर security check में packet confiscate + warning। Embarrassment + food waste + hungry family — सिर्फ इसलिए क्योंकि basic food rules पता नहीं थे। Tirumala temple area — hilltop पूरा — एक sanctified zone है। यहाँ food rules strictly enforce किए जाते हैं। Non-veg, alcohol, tobacco — obvious bans। लेकिन कुछ rules हैं जो first-timers को surprise करते हैं — packaged food restrictions, queue inside food rules, और even कुछ vegetarian items जो allowed नहीं हैं। यह article complete clarity देगा — exactly क्या carry कर सकते हो, क्या नहीं, queue में क्या खा सकते हो, Annadanam rules, और अगर गलती से restricted item लाया तो क्या होता है।
⚡ संक्षिप्त उत्तर — Tirumala Food Rules:
  • Non-veg: Strictly BANNED — carry करना भी prohibited (entry पर confiscate)
  • Alcohol/Tobacco: Completely banned — consumption + carrying दोनों
  • Vegetarian food: Allowed — carry कर सकते हो (snacks, fruits, packed items)
  • Queue food: Light snacks + water allowed — full meals not practical
  • Outside food in temple: Restricted inside sanctum sanctorum area
  • Free food: TTD Annadanam available — breakfast, lunch, dinner free
[caption id="attachment_1391" align="alignnone" width="1024"] 12-15 घंटे queue में survive करने का smart food plan — banana + biscuit + dry fruits + 2L water। Heavy meals avoid करो, light और energy-dense snacks carry करो।[/caption]

Tirumala Food Rules — Complete List

✅ ALLOWED — ये items ला सकते हो:

  • ✅ Fruits (banana, apple, orange, grapes) — best snack for queue
  • ✅ Dry fruits (almonds, cashews, raisins, dates)
  • ✅ Biscuits, cookies (packaged vegetarian)
  • ✅ Glucose/energy bars
  • ✅ Bread, rusk
  • ✅ Packaged chips (vegetarian — check label)
  • ✅ Homemade vegetarian snacks (namkeen, chivda, laddoo)
  • ✅ Water bottles (sealed packaged)
  • ✅ Juice packs (packaged)
  • ✅ Baby food (formula, cereal, milk packets)
  • ✅ Medicines that require food intake
  • ✅ Coconut (whole — offering purpose)
  • ✅ Pooja items (flowers, camphor — not food but related)

❌ BANNED — ये items absolutely मत लाओ:

  • ❌ Non-vegetarian food — ANY form (chicken, mutton, fish, eggs, even egg-containing cakes/biscuits)
  • ❌ Alcohol — any type, any quantity
  • ❌ Tobacco products — cigarettes, bidi, gutkha, paan masala
  • ❌ Onion and Garlic — technically restricted in some temple zones (strict interpretation)
  • ❌ Leather items bringing food (leather bags with food) — grey area but avoid

⚠️ GREY AREA — Context Dependent:

  • ⚠️ Onion/Garlic containing food — some authorities strict, some lenient। Best: Avoid carrying
  • ⚠️ Egg-containing biscuits/cakes — technically non-veg ingredient। Read labels, pure veg prefer करो
  • ⚠️ Large quantity packed food — looks like "commercial sale" to security। Personal use amount okay
  • ⚠️ Hot packed food (biryani boxes, full meal containers) — suspicious even if veg, may be checked/questioned
⚠️ **जरूरी बात:** Security check Tirumala bus stand area + temple entry points दोनों पर होता है। Bags scan होते हैं। Non-veg items detected → confiscate + warning। Repeat offenders → entry deny possible। Best policy: When in doubt, don't carry it।

Queue में Food Rules — Darshan Line Inside

VQC (Vaikuntam Queue Complex) और darshan queue 6-20 hours हो सकती है। Food essential है — but rules हैं:

Queue में ALLOWED:

  • ✅ Water bottle (multiple carry करो — dehydration risk high)
  • ✅ Biscuits, glucose biscuits
  • ✅ Dry fruits, nuts
  • ✅ Bananas, small fruits
  • ✅ Energy bars, chocolate
  • ✅ Baby milk/formula
  • ✅ Medicines

Queue में PRACTICAL ISSUES:

  • Full meals — technically not banned but impractical (no table, no space, smell disturbs others)
  • Strong-smelling food — avoided out of courtesy (sambar/curry containers)
  • Waste disposal — कूड़ा queue में मत फेंको, dustbins designated points पर
  • Plastic covers — food wrap से littering serious offense
💡 **Insider Tip:** Queue food strategy: Bananas (3-4) + glucose biscuits (2 packets) + dry fruits (small pouch) + 2 litre water = 12-15 hours survival। Compact, non-messy, non-smelly, energy-dense। यही combination experienced pilgrims carry करते हैं। Heavy food avoid — queue में digestion difficult + restroom break = spot lose risk।

Non-Veg Ban — Detail में समझो

Why Non-Veg is Banned:

  • Religious sanctity: Tirumala divine abode — ahimsa (non-violence) principle
  • Temple tradition: 1,000+ year old rule — not new, not negotiable
  • Entire hilltop: Ban सिर्फ temple inside नहीं — पूरा Tirumala hilltop area covered
  • TTD enforcement: Security checks at entry points (bus stand, footpath gates)

Common Questions:

  • "Egg wala biscuit chalega?" — Technically no (egg = non-veg ingredient)। Reality: Packaged items rarely checked ingredient-by-ingredient, but better safe — pure veg choose करो।
  • "Restaurant में non-veg milta hai Tirumala pe?" — Absolutely not। Zero non-veg restaurants on Tirumala hilltop।
  • "Bus में khake aau fir?" — Bus ride 45 min — possible, but Tirumala bus itself scrutinized area। Better: Tirupati में khao before bus।
  • "Confiscate hone pe fine lagta hai?" — Usually confiscation + warning। Repeat/large quantity = potentially stronger action।
⚠️ **जरूरी बात:** यह rule religious sentiment और tradition पर based है — debate या argument मत करो security से। Respect the space — चाहे आप personally कुछ भी खाते हो, Tirumala पर veg follow करो बिना protest के। 1-2 days है — adjust करो।

Onion-Garlic Rule — Clarity

यह most confusing rule है pilgrims के लिए:
  • Strict interpretation: Temple cooking (prasadam, Annadanam) में onion-garlic use नहीं होता — sattvic food
  • Carry rule: Technically onion-garlic containing food carry "discouraged" — but enforcement varies
  • Practical reality: Packed snacks/chips with onion flavouring rarely confiscated — focus non-veg detection पर
  • Homemade food: अगर onion wali sabzi carry कर रहे — likely no issue if clearly vegetarian
  • Best practice: Avoid if possible — sattvic food prefer करो temple visit पर (spiritual benefit भी)
💡 **Insider Tip:** Tirumala trip = spiritual detox opportunity। 2-3 days onion-garlic free, sattvic (simple, fresh, mild) food — body और mind दोनों lighter feel करते हैं। TTD Annadanam perfectly sattvic है — free, nutritious, और temple-appropriate। Adopt this — regret नहीं होगा।

TTD Annadanam — Free Food (Complete Info)

Tirumala पर food stress लेने की ज़रूरत नहीं — TTD Annadanam free unlimited meals provide करता है:
  • Meals: Breakfast + Lunch + Dinner — all three available
  • Cost: Completely FREE — no ticket, no booking, no ID required
  • Capacity: 10,000+ pilgrims daily — rarely "full" situation
  • Menu: Simple South Indian — rice, sambar, rasam, curd, vegetable, pickle
  • Taste: Simple, nutritious, sattvic — not "restaurant quality" but satisfying
  • Location: Multiple Annadanam halls across Tirumala — signboards everywhere
  • Queue: 15-30 min typically — manageable

Annadanam Timing (approximate):

  • Breakfast: 6:00 AM – 10:00 AM
  • Lunch: 11:00 AM – 3:00 PM
  • Dinner: 6:00 PM – 9:00 PM
  • Note: Timings vary slightly — TTD adjusts based on crowd and season
⚠️ **जरूरी बात:** Annadanam waste करना disrespectful है — जितना खा सको उतना लो plate में। "Nahi chahiye" बोल सकते हो serving time — servers respect करते हैं। Leftover plate = food waste = bad karma AND practical problem (cleaning)।

Temple Area Specific Rules

Inside Temple Premises (sanctum sanctorum area):

  • No outside food allowed inside temple building — eat before entering
  • Prasadam only food inside — Laddu and other prasadam items
  • Water drinking allowed — water coolers available inside temple complex
  • Chewing gum prohibited (temple respect)

Queue Lines (outside temple but within complex):

  • Snacks + water allowed (as listed above)
  • No cooking/heating food — obviously
  • Dispose waste in dustbins only — littering = fine possible

General Tirumala Town Area:

  • Vegetarian food freely available (Annadanam, canteens)
  • Carry veg food items anywhere — no restriction in public areas
  • Picnic-style eating in parks/open areas — acceptable
  • TTD canteens paid (₹30-60) — located at multiple points

Darshan Day Food Plan — Practical Strategy

  • Before queue (5-6 AM): Annadanam breakfast या room food — proper meal
  • Carry into queue: 3-4 bananas + glucose biscuits + dry fruits + 2L water + ORS packet
  • Queue में (every 3-4 hours): 1 banana + biscuits + water sip — energy maintain
  • After darshan: Annadanam lunch/dinner — full satisfying meal
  • Avoid: Heavy food before/during queue — acidity + restroom urgency risk

अगर Restricted Item लेकर आ गए — क्या होगा?

  • Security check: Bags scanned at Tirumala bus stand + temple entry
  • Detection: Non-veg/alcohol found → confiscated immediately
  • Consequence: Item disposed + verbal warning (first time)
  • Serious cases: Large quantity, commercial intent, repeat = stronger action possible
  • No physical harm: Security polite but firm — cooperate, apologize, move on
  • Tip: अगर accidentally ला लिया (egg biscuit unknowingly) — voluntarily surrender करो, explain "didn't know" — understanding मिलेगी

आम गलतियाँ — Common Mistakes

  • ❌ Train से Biryani/Non-veg pack करवाकर Tirumala ले जाना — Most common mistake North Indian first-timers की। Non-veg carry करना = confiscation + embarrassment। Tirupati station पर ही खा लो, Tirumala पर veg only।
  • ❌ "Egg biscuit/cake तो veg ही है" assume करना — Egg technically non-veg ingredient in temple context। Pure veg label check करो packaged items पर। Green dot (●) = safe। Brown dot (●) = non-veg, avoid।
  • ❌ Queue में heavy food carry करना — Puri-sabzi, rice containers — impractical, smelly, space-consuming। Light snacks sufficient — banana + biscuit + water = perfect queue food।
  • ❌ Water insufficient carry करना queue में — "TTD water milega" — available hai but crowded spots पर access difficult। Minimum 2 litre own water carry — dehydration 12+ hour queue में real emergency बन सकता है।
  • ❌ Annadanam timing miss करना — "Baad mein khaa lenge" → timing over → hungry night। Annadanam timings note करो (B: 6-10 AM, L: 11 AM-3 PM, D: 6-9 PM) और plan accordingly।
  • ❌ Food waste Annadanam में — Plate भर liya, half khaya, baki pheka — disrespectful + waste। "Thoda kam do" bolo serving time — refill le sakte ho बाद में। Waste = bad karma।
  • ❌ Tirumala पर restaurant ढूँढना — Private restaurants Tirumala hilltop पर exist नहीं करते (TTD controlled)। TTD Annadanam (free) और TTD canteens (₹30-60) — yehi options hain। Accept this, plan around it।

इन्हें भी पढ़ें

  • Annadanam तिरुमला — free meals कैसे मिलती हैं pilgrims को
  • तिरुपति के best vegetarian restaurants — pilgrims के लिए guide
  • तिरुमला लड्डू प्रसाद — इतिहास, प्रकार और कैसे मिलता है
  • तिरुपति यात्रा packing list — ये चीज़ें भूलना मत

अक्सर पूछे जाने वाले प्रश्न — FAQ

[sc_fs_multi_faq headline-0="h4" question-0="प्र. Tirumala पर non-veg food ला सकते हैं?" answer-0="बिल्कुल नहीं — Tirumala hilltop पर non-veg food carry करना strictly prohibited है। Security check (bag scan) entry points पर — detected items confiscated + warning। Eggs, chicken, mutton, fish — ANY form banned। Tirupati (नीचे) में खाकर आओ, Tirumala पर pure veg only।" headline-1="h4" question-1="प्र. Darshan queue में खाना ला सकते हैं?" answer-1="हाँ — light snacks + water allowed। Banana, biscuits, dry fruits, glucose, energy bars, packaged juice — सब okay। Heavy meals (rice containers, curry packets) technically banned नहीं but impractical + discouraged। Smart queue food: Banana + glucose biscuit + dry fruits + 2L water।" headline-2="h4" question-2="प्र. Tirumala पर onion-garlic allowed है?" answer-2="Grey area — strictly speaking temple cooking में onion-garlic use नहीं होता (sattvic food)। Carry करने पर enforcement varies — packed snacks with onion flavouring rarely confiscated। Best practice: Avoid if possible। TTD Annadanam onion-garlic free है — follow that standard for temple visit।" headline-3="h4" question-3="प्र. Tirumala पर free food मिलता है?" answer-3="हाँ — TTD Annadanam completely free है। Breakfast (6-10 AM), Lunch (11 AM-3 PM), Dinner (6-9 PM)। Simple South Indian food — rice, sambar, rasam, curd, vegetable। No booking, no ID — anyone can eat। 10,000+ pilgrims daily served।" headline-4="h4" question-4="प्र. Egg wala biscuit/cake Tirumala ला सकते हैं?" answer-4="Technically egg = non-veg ingredient। Strict interpretation: Not allowed। Practical reality: Packaged items rarely checked ingredient-by-ingredient, but better safe — pure veg choose करो (Green dot ● label)। Why risk for a biscuit? Plenty of pure veg options available।" headline-5="h4" question-5="प्र. Tirumala पर restaurant हैं?" answer-5="Private restaurants Tirumala hilltop पर नहीं हैं — TTD controlled area। Food options: TTD Annadanam (free, unlimited), TTD canteens (₹30-60, paid), small authorized stalls। अगर variety food चाहिए — Tirupati (22 km below) में restaurants available, bus से 45 min।" headline-6="h4" question-6="प्र. गलती से restricted item ला लिया — क्या करें?" answer-6="Security check पर voluntarily surrender करो — 'pata nahi tha, sorry' बोलो। First time = confiscation + warning (polite)। Cooperate करो, argue मत करो। Serious cases (large quantity/repeat) = stronger action possible but rare for genuine mistakes।" count="7" html="true"] ⚠️ **Tirumala food rules TTD enforce करता है — rules change/update हो सकते हैं। Latest rules tirumala.org पर verify करें।** *Last Updated: June 2026*

wp:postmeta.wp:meta_value: तिरुमला में food rules 2026 — क्या खाना ला सकते हैं, non-veg allowed है क्या, queue में food, और Annadanam rules। Complete list क्या allowed, क्या banned।

item.title: Srivari Mettu Footpath — तिरुपति से तिरुमला की खड़ी सीढ़ियों से पैदल यात्रा
item.dc:creator: adminyg
item.excerpt:encoded: Srivari Mettu — सिर्फ 4 km लेकिन Alipiri से दोगुनी steepness। शांत जंगल, steep सीढ़ियाँ, और ऊपर भगवान वेंकटेश्वर का धाम।

wp:postmeta.wp:meta_value: Srivari Mettu की खड़ी सीढ़ियों पर सुबह अंधेरे में headlamp लगाकर चढ़ता हुआ तीर्थयात्री — घने जंगल के बीच steep stone steps और ऊपर तिरुमला मंदिर की सुनहरी रोशनी

item.title: alipiri-footpath-night-trek-3550-steps-tirumala
item.dc:creator: adminyg
item.excerpt:encoded: रात 2-3 AM, "Govinda Govinda" के नारे, 3,550 सीढ़ियाँ, और ऊपर भगवान वेंकटेश्वर का दर्शन — Alipiri trek एक यात्रा नहीं, जीवन का अनुभव है।

wp:postmeta.wp:meta_value: Alipiri footpath पर रात के अंधेरे में lights के बीच सीढ़ियाँ चढ़ते श्रद्धालु — "Govinda Govinda" के नारे, rest shelter पर buttermilk सेवा, और ऊपर sunrise में चमकता तिरुमला मंदिर

item.title: ttd-epass-download-save-print-step-by-step-guide
item.dc:creator: adminyg
item.excerpt:encoded: Booking → Download → Save + Print → Gate Entry। TTD ePass की ये 4 steps याद रखो — Tirumala में network नहीं मिलेगा, इसलिए पहले से तैयार रहो।

wp:postmeta.wp:meta_value: TTD ePass की पूरी process — online booking से download, phone में save, printout लेना, और तिरुमला gate पर QR scan तक के 4 steps का infographic illustration

item.title: ttd-darshan-ticket-cancel-48-hour-deadline-refund-policy
item.dc:creator: adminyg
item.excerpt:encoded: TTD SED ₹300 ticket cancel करनी है? Slot से 48 घंटे पहले करो — ₹275 वापस मिलेंगे। Deadline miss की तो ₹0। जितनी जल्दी decide करो, उतना फायदा।

wp:postmeta.wp:meta_value: TTD darshan ticket cancel करने की 48 घंटे की deadline — एक तरफ समय पर cancel करने पर ₹275 refund, दूसरी तरफ deadline miss होने पर ₹0 refund — worried pilgrim phone पर cancel button देख रहा है

item.title: tirumala-temple-history-pallava-chola-vijayanagar-dynasty-evolution
item.dc:creator: adminyg
item.excerpt:encoded: एक मंदिर, तीन राजवंश, 1,000 साल — Pallava ने नींव रखी, Chola ने विस्तार किया, और Krishnadevaraya ने सोने से सजाकर वो भव्य रूप दिया जो आज दिखता है।

wp:postmeta.wp:meta_value: तिरुमला मंदिर का 1,000 साल का इतिहास — Pallava काल में साधारण stone structure से Chola विस्तार और Vijayanagar युग में Krishnadevaraya द्वारा भव्य gold-plated मंदिर तक का evolution

item.title: tirumala-accommodation-booking-strategy-10am-online-tirupati-backup
item.dc:creator: adminyg
item.excerpt:encoded: TTD cottages 10 AM पर खुलते हैं और 5-10 मिनट में full। Smart move? Tirumala room try करो, पर Tirupati hotel हमेशा backup रखो — room न मिले तो भी darshan guaranteed।

wp:postmeta.wp:meta_value: तिरुमला room booking strategy — बाएं 10 AM sharp online booking race (multiple devices, 5-10 min में full), दाएं smart backup plan (Tirupati hotel pre-book करके bus से darshan)

item.title: tirumala-darshan-queue-food-packing-guide-what-to-carry
item.dc:creator: adminyg
item.excerpt:encoded: 12-15 घंटे queue में survive करने का smart food plan — banana + biscuit + dry fruits + 2L water। Heavy meals avoid करो, light और energy-dense snacks carry करो।

wp:postmeta.wp:meta_value: तिरुमला दर्शन queue के लिए ideal food kit — केले, glucose biscuits, dry fruits, water bottles और energy bar एक backpack में — साथ में banned heavy food items crossed out

item.title: tirupati-family-friendly-hotel-facilities-checklist-seniors-kids
item.dc:creator: adminyg
item.excerpt:encoded: Family trip में hotel choose करते time checklist: Elevator ✓ Western toilet ✓ Hot water ✓ Restaurant ✓ Spacious room ✓ Pharmacy nearby ✓ — seniors और बच्चे दोनों comfortable।

wp:postmeta.wp:meta_value: तिरुपति में ideal family hotel का cross-section — elevator, Western toilet, spacious room, restaurant, pharmacy nearby, और खुश family (seniors, kids सब comfortable)

item.title: tirumala-kalyana-katta-tonsure-mokkuvalu-hair-offering-process
item.dc:creator: adminyg
item.excerpt:encoded: Kalyana Katta — 600+ chairs, professional barbers, completely FREE। तिरुमला में tonsure compulsory नहीं, यह devotion और मनौती (mokkuvalu) का symbol है — men, women, बच्चे सब करवा सकते हैं।

wp:postmeta.wp:meta_value: तिरुमला Kalyana Katta में tonsure (mokkuvalu) process — professional TTD barbers, अलग women section, baby का first mundan पिता की गोद में, और token system — दुनिया का सबसे बड़ा hair offering center

item.title: tirupati-station-hotels-budget-distance-map-bus-stand-guide
item.dc:creator: adminyg
item.excerpt:encoded: तिरुपति station के 1 km radius में 50+ hotels — सब budget और distance के हिसाब से। Tirumala bus stand सिर्फ 5 min walk। यही station area में रुकने का सबसे बड़ा फायदा है।

wp:postmeta.wp:meta_value: तिरुपति railway station के पास hotels का map — budget (₹500-800), mid-range (₹800-1,500), comfortable (₹1,500-3,000) categories distance के हिसाब से, और Tirumala bus stand सिर्फ 5 min walk
